instruction:
(a) Eric plans to spend \$12.25 on ice cream cones at \$1.75 each. Write an equation whose solution is the number of ice cream cones he can buy. Use $n$ for the number of ice cream cones. You may asssume there is no tax. [ANS]
(b) Solve your equation above for the number of ice cream cones $n$. $n=$ [ANS]
